era: 1989-1992. Grunge. E=7 -- heavy, Sub Pop, founding moment supporting roster.
associated_musicians: Steve Fisk (producer: Screaming Trees, Pell Mell, numerous PNW acts)

theory_nodes.concept: Linda Hendrix: female vocalist in early Sub Pop heavy grunge (1989-1992). Accommodation-free performance in a male-dominated catalog. Female vocalist thread: Hammerbox (222) + Swallow (324) + riot grrrl parallel (Bikini Kill, Olympia).
theory_nodes.description: Women in the founding moment of grunge: Swallow documents the Sub Pop chapter.

theory_nodes.concept: Sub Pop founding moment from supporting roster position: 1989-1992, same period as Mudhoney, Nirvana, Soundgarden. Swallow documents what the community surrounding the summit acts sounded like.
Steve Fisk production thread: connects Swallow to Screaming Trees (S36-307) and the broader PNW underground. Same producer, multiple engine entries.
theory_nodes.description: Fisk as sonic thread through multiple engine degrees.

cross_references.relationship: E=8 to E=7. The last high-energy pre-summit echo gives way to the founding-moment Sub Pop supporting band.
Same Sub Pop founding window (1989). Summit vs. supporting roster in the same moment.
Steve Fisk production connection. The same producer documented both.
Female vocalist thread. Carrie Akre and Linda Hendrix: both active in the grunge tradition without accommodation.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=7 S36 vs. E=8 SPS. The founding-moment grunge band paired with the most complete PNW soundscape in the engine. The human acoustic contribution vs. the natural acoustic ecology at full expression.

milestones: FOUNDING MOMENT SUB POP SUPPORTING ROSTER
